about.heading: About
about.p1: Junior Frontend Engineer, with a year of experience under my belt, mostly working with Nuxt.js, React.js, Tailwind CSS, and Bootstrap.
about.p2: I am really into responsive design, making websites faster (performance optimization), and implementing designs that work for everyone, including people with disabilities (a11y).
about.p3: I am currently seeking a frontend developer role where I can contribute and leverage my skills.

education.heading: Education
education.title: Computer Engineering
education.school: Mohammed VI International Academy of Civil Aviation, Nouaceur, MA

tasks.task_1: Worked with a team of 3 frontend developers on two projects: an accounting platform and an e-learning platform.
tasks.task_2: Built key frontend features, such as dynamic forms and data tables, ensuring smooth functionality and user interaction.
tasks.task_3: Conducted code reviews, contributing to code quality and best practices.
tasks.task_4: Integrated SEO techniques, enhancing the visibility and reach of the platforms.
tasks.task_5: Implemented responsive design, ensuring compatibility across devices.

tasks.task_1: Gained hands-on experience with version control (Git) and agile development processes.
tasks.task_2: Developed a strong understanding of frontend technologies ( modern Javascript, Typescript, Vue.js and React.js).
tasks.task_3: Participated in code reviews and discussions, learning best practices and frontend development workflows.
tasks.task_4: Learned about the user stories and contributed to defining features based on user needs.
